find /workspace/grafana--26d36ec/pkg/services/ngalert -name "*.go" | sort | sed 's|/workspace/grafana--26d36ec/||' | python3 -c "
import sys, json

files = [{'repo': 'grafana/grafana', 'path': line.strip()} for line in sys.stdin]

text = '''Grafana Unified Alerting (ngalert) Architecture:

The ngalert subsystem is rooted at pkg/services/ngalert/ and consists of the following major components:

1. ENTRY POINT: ngalert.go - The NgAlertNG service that wires all components together on startup.

2. ALERT RULE STORAGE (pkg/services/ngalert/store/):
   - alert_rule.go: CRUD operations for alert rules in the database (DBstore)
   - instance_database.go / proto_instance_database.go: Alert instance (state) persistence
   - database.go: DBstore struct and base DB operations
   - provisioning_store.go: Stores provenance/provisioning metadata
   - admin_configuration.go: Admin config (external Alertmanager) storage
   - alertmanager.go: Alertmanager config store
   - image.go: Image storage for alert screenshots
   - namespace.go: Folder/namespace operations
   - transactions.go: Transaction support
   - deltas.go: Alert rule delta computation

3. SCHEDULER (pkg/services/ngalert/schedule/):
   - schedule.go: Main scheduler loop - fetches rules, dispatches evaluation goroutines
   - alert_rule.go: Per-alert-rule evaluation routine (alertRuleInfo)
   - recording_rule.go: Recording rule evaluation routine
   - registry.go: In-memory registry of actively-scheduled rules
   - fetcher.go: Fetches rule groups from store for scheduling
   - jitter.go: Evaluation jitter logic
   - retry.go: Retry logic for rule evaluations
   - sequence.go: Sequence tracking
   - loaded_metrics_reader.go: Reports scheduler metrics
   - ticker/ticker.go: The clock ticker that drives the schedule

4. STATE MANAGER (pkg/services/ngalert/state/):
   - manager.go: StateManager - processes evaluation results, transitions alert states
   - state.go: State struct and transition logic
   - cache.go: In-memory state cache
   - persist.go: StatePersister interface
   - persister_sync.go / persister_async.go / persister_noop.go: Persistence strategies
   - persister_sync_rule.go: Sync persister for single rules
   - multi_instance_reader.go: Reads instances from multiple sources
   - template/template.go: Alert label/annotation template evaluation
   - compat.go: Compatibility helpers

5. NOTIFIER (pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/):
   - multiorg_alertmanager.go: MultiOrgAlertmanager - manages per-org Alertmanager instances
   - alertmanager.go: Per-org Alertmanager wrapping Prometheus alertmanager
   - alertmanager_config.go: Alertmanager configuration management
   - autogen_alertmanager.go: Auto-generated Alertmanager for simplified setups
   - config.go: Configuration loading
   - crypto.go: Secrets encryption/decryption for receiver configs
   - file_store.go: KV-based file store for alertmanager state
   - images.go: Image provider for notifications
   - receiver_svc.go: ReceiverService for CRUD of receivers
   - silence_svc.go: SilenceService for managing silences
   - redis_peer.go / redis_channel.go: Redis-based HA clustering
   - sender.go: Sends alerts to the alertmanager
   - templates.go: Template management
   - legacy_storage/: Legacy storage layer for alertmanager config
   - alertmanager_mock/: Mock implementations

6. HISTORY WRITER (pkg/services/ngalert/state/historian/):
   - core.go: Core historian logic and interfaces
   - backend.go: Backend interface
   - annotation.go: Annotations backend (writes to Grafana annotation store)
   - loki.go: Loki backend (writes state transitions to Loki)
   - prometheus.go: Prometheus/remote-write backend
   - multiple.go: Fan-out historian writing to multiple backends
   - noop.go: No-op historian
   - query.go: History query support
   - model/rule.go: Rule model for history
   - dashboard.go: Dashboard/panel helpers for annotation context

7. WRITER (pkg/services/ngalert/writer/): Recording rule metric writers
   - prom.go: Prometheus remote-write writer
   - datasourcewriter.go: Datasource-based writer

8. SENDER (pkg/services/ngalert/sender/):
   - router.go: Routes alerts to local or external Alertmanager
   - sender.go: Sends firing alerts to external Alertmanager
   - notifier.go: Internal notifier

9. EVAL (pkg/services/ngalert/eval/):
   - eval.go: ConditionEvaluator - evaluates alert rule conditions
   - context.go: Evaluation context
   - validate.go: Rule validation

10. PROVISIONING (pkg/services/ngalert/provisioning/):
    - alert_rules.go, contactpoints.go, templates.go, etc.: CRUD for provisioned resources

11. API (pkg/services/ngalert/api/): HTTP API handlers for all alerting endpoints

12. MODELS (pkg/services/ngalert/models/): Shared data models (AlertRule, AlertInstance, etc.)

13. REMOTE (pkg/services/ngalert/remote/): Remote/Mimir alertmanager integration
'''

result = {'files': files, 'text': text}
with open('/workspace/answer.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
print('Written', len(files), 'files to /workspace/answer.json')
"

import sys, json

files = [{'repo': 'grafana/grafana', 'path': line.strip()} for line in sys.stdin]

text = '''Grafana Unified Alerting (ngalert) Architecture:

The ngalert subsystem is rooted at pkg/services/ngalert/ and consists of the following major components:

1. ENTRY POINT: ngalert.go - The NgAlertNG service that wires all components together on startup.

2. ALERT RULE STORAGE (pkg/services/ngalert/store/):
   - alert_rule.go: CRUD operations for alert rules in the database (DBstore)
   - instance_database.go / proto_instance_database.go: Alert instance (state) persistence
   - database.go: DBstore struct and base DB operations
   - provisioning_store.go: Stores provenance/provisioning metadata
   - admin_configuration.go: Admin config (external Alertmanager) storage
   - alertmanager.go: Alertmanager config store
   - image.go: Image storage for alert screenshots
   - namespace.go: Folder/namespace operations
   - transactions.go: Transaction support
   - deltas.go: Alert rule delta computation

3. SCHEDULER (pkg/services/ngalert/schedule/):
   - schedule.go: Main scheduler loop - fetches rules, dispatches evaluation goroutines
   - alert_rule.go: Per-alert-rule evaluation routine (alertRuleInfo)
   - recording_rule.go: Recording rule evaluation routine
   - registry.go: In-memory registry of actively-scheduled rules
   - fetcher.go: Fetches rule groups from store for scheduling
   - jitter.go: Evaluation jitter logic
   - retry.go: Retry logic for rule evaluations
   - sequence.go: Sequence tracking
   - loaded_metrics_reader.go: Reports scheduler metrics
   - ticker/ticker.go: The clock ticker that drives the schedule

4. STATE MANAGER (pkg/services/ngalert/state/):
   - manager.go: StateManager - processes evaluation results, transitions alert states
   - state.go: State struct and transition logic
   - cache.go: In-memory state cache
   - persist.go: StatePersister interface
   - persister_sync.go / persister_async.go / persister_noop.go: Persistence strategies
   - persister_sync_rule.go: Sync persister for single rules
   - multi_instance_reader.go: Reads instances from multiple sources
   - template/template.go: Alert label/annotation template evaluation
   - compat.go: Compatibility helpers

5. NOTIFIER (pkg/services/ngalert/notifier/):
   - multiorg_alertmanager.go: MultiOrgAlertmanager - manages per-org Alertmanager instances
   - alertmanager.go: Per-org Alertmanager wrapping Prometheus alertmanager
   - alertmanager_config.go: Alertmanager configuration management
   - autogen_alertmanager.go: Auto-generated Alertmanager for simplified setups
   - config.go: Configuration loading
   - crypto.go: Secrets encryption/decryption for receiver configs
   - file_store.go: KV-based file store for alertmanager state
   - images.go: Image provider for notifications
   - receiver_svc.go: ReceiverService for CRUD of receivers
   - silence_svc.go: SilenceService for managing silences
   - redis_peer.go / redis_channel.go: Redis-based HA clustering
   - sender.go: Sends alerts to the alertmanager
   - templates.go: Template management
   - legacy_storage/: Legacy storage layer for alertmanager config
   - alertmanager_mock/: Mock implementations

6. HISTORY WRITER (pkg/services/ngalert/state/historian/):
   - core.go: Core historian logic and interfaces
   - backend.go: Backend interface
   - annotation.go: Annotations backend (writes to Grafana annotation store)
   - loki.go: Loki backend (writes state transitions to Loki)
   - prometheus.go: Prometheus/remote-write backend
   - multiple.go: Fan-out historian writing to multiple backends
   - noop.go: No-op historian
   - query.go: History query support
   - model/rule.go: Rule model for history
   - dashboard.go: Dashboard/panel helpers for annotation context

7. WRITER (pkg/services/ngalert/writer/): Recording rule metric writers
   - prom.go: Prometheus remote-write writer
   - datasourcewriter.go: Datasource-based writer

8. SENDER (pkg/services/ngalert/sender/):
   - router.go: Routes alerts to local or external Alertmanager
   - sender.go: Sends firing alerts to external Alertmanager
   - notifier.go: Internal notifier

9. EVAL (pkg/services/ngalert/eval/):
   - eval.go: ConditionEvaluator - evaluates alert rule conditions
   - context.go: Evaluation context
   - validate.go: Rule validation

10. PROVISIONING (pkg/services/ngalert/provisioning/):
    - alert_rules.go, contactpoints.go, templates.go, etc.: CRUD for provisioned resources

11. API (pkg/services/ngalert/api/): HTTP API handlers for all alerting endpoints

12. MODELS (pkg/services/ngalert/models/): Shared data models (AlertRule, AlertInstance, etc.)

13. REMOTE (pkg/services/ngalert/remote/): Remote/Mimir alertmanager integration
'''

result = {'files': files, 'text': text}
with open('/workspace/answer.json', 'w') as f:
    json.dump(result, f, indent=2)
print('Written', len(files), 'files to /workspace/answer.json')
"
